output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?directorLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q14772351 wdt:P57 ?director .
  ?director rdfs:label ?directorLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?directorLabel) = 'en')
}
output.result:
Got 1 row and 1 column:
| directorLabel         |
| --------------------- |
| Zack Snyder (lang:en) |
output.formatted:
Zack Snyder

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?directorLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q14772351 wdt:P57 ?director .
  ?director rdfs:label ?directorLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?directorLabel) = 'en')
}
```

Execution result:
Got 1 row and 1 column:
| directorLabel         |
| --------------------- |
| Zack Snyder (lang:en) |
